It's sad that Democrats are more focused on political revenge than serving YOUR needs. It's also an excellent reminder that it TRULY MATTERS who controls the U.S. Senate.
Friend,

Democrats just concluded the unconstitutional impeachment trial of a FORMER president. For the good of our country, I hope we never have an impeachment trial for a private citizen again.

It's sad that Democrats are more focused on political revenge than serving YOUR needs. It's also an excellent reminder that it TRULY MATTERS who controls the U.S. Senate.

Gavin Newsom has failed California in nearly every way: ❌ Slow economic recovery ❌ Slow vaccine rollout ❌ Slow in helping small businesses and communities recover ❌ Slow in providing job relief Friend, it's time Gavin Newsom faced the facts: he's just not cutting it as the leader Californians need during this time. If you agree, take a quick moment to grade his performance for you and other Californians who need and deserve relief. How would you grade Gov. Newsom 's performance and response to the needs of CA? | == == == == == For my team and me, the answer is clear. But we want to know what you think, Friend. In Congress, I am working towards finding real solutions and making real, meaningful changes in our communities -- something Newsom has failed at. Thanks for sharing your thoughts, Young Kim == Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == ** ** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: We need to keep up with the Democrats’ deep pockets

Friend,

We've got good news and bad news:

**The bad news:** Democrats are ready, willing, and able to spend millions to buy districts like the one Michelle Steel flipped in 2020 from blue to red. Last year alone they spent over $11 million to make it happen.

**The good news:** Their dark money was not enough, and conservatives like you stopped them in their tracks. Californians rejected the Radical Left's socialist agenda and said enough is enough.

Now, strong conservative women like Michelle Steel are pushing back against new taxes, resisting tax hikes, and are doing all they can to support small businesses. But to keep working for California's taxpayers like you, they need our help to stand up to the Democrats' dark money machine. We already have so much momentum from 2020 in the numerous upset elections around the country. Last year, voters rejected the Democrats' deep pockets and dark money, and we must ensure that we can do that again in 2022. **Conservatives like Michelle must keep going if we want to retake the House Majority in 2022 for the Republicans.**

Friend, it's going to be tough, but with support from patriots like you, we can make it happen.

clean_body: The Democrats have already launched a massive fundraising campaign against me. Our values could be at stake, which is why we are reaching out.zwnj; ** <e. == Friend, We've got good news and bad news: The bad news: Democrats are ready, willing, and able to spend millions to buy districts like the one Michelle Steel flipped in 2020 from blue to red. Last year alone they spent over $11 million to make it happen. The good news: Their dark money was not enough, and conservatives like you stopped them in their tracks. Californians rejected the Radical Left's socialist agenda and said enough is enough. Now, strong conservative women like Michelle Steel are pushing back against new taxes, resisting tax hikes, and are doing all they can to support small businesses. But to keep working for California's taxpayers like you, they need our help to stand up to the Democrats' dark money machine. == == | == We already have so much momentum from 2020 in the numerous upset elections around the country. Last year, voters rejected the Democrats' deep pockets and dark money, and we must ensure that we can do that again in 2022. Conservatives like Michelle must keep going if we want to retake the House Majority in 2022 for the Republicans. Friend, it's going to be tough, but with support from patriots like you, we can make it happen. == == == == We can 't let Michelle down.** Thank you for your support, California Republican Alerts With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Friend, The power crisis in Texas is the fault of our forced dependence on unreliable renewable "green" energy sources. There's no denying it. Despite this, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is aiming to EXPLOIT this crisis to push her Communist Green New Deal. That's why I need your help today to STOP them before it's too late. All donations to my campaign will be 500% MATCHED until MIDNIGHT in order to STOP AOC and her radical allies from DESTROYING our energy sector. clean_body: Will you sign my petition? &zwnj == == Friend, did you get my team's email yesterday? Liberal elite Bill Gates is pushing the United States to move to produce 100% synthetic beef, which would leave our Iowa livestock producers without jobs! I went to Washington to give a voice to rural Americans, but Democrats are only interested in listening to coastal billionaire elites like Bill Gates. == == It is so important we take immediate action here so Democrats do not move forward with this job-killing policy that would decimate one of our critical American industries. Thank you, Congresswoman Ashley Hinson \------------BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE------------ Friend, did you hear the latest news? Liberal billionaire Bill Gates proposed the United States should move to 100% synthetic beef, which would put the beef industry out of business! That 's just not common sense, Friend. Ashley Hinson is determined to stand up for our American livestock industry, which provides jobs to people across the country. She is not about to let liberal elites, like Bill Gates, deprive Americans of the right to make an honest living. == == America is about allowing people the freedom to live their own lives and earn an honest living. Why should we let the radical left billionaires determine what industries are allowed to thrive and what we can eat? == == Thank you, Team Hinson | Follow and Share us with your network! | ==| ==| == ---|---|--- == PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Will you join me in taking on the Deep State who tried to destroy Donald Trump? | | | == | | | == | | | == | These Never-Trump Deep State cronies fed the country lies in order to elect Hillary Clinton and take down Donald Trump, and they still have not been held accountable. The media has lauded the Deep State and repeated the lies because of their hatred for Trump and his supporters. We need to stand up to this corrupt system that will stop at nothing to destroy their "enemies" | | | == | | | == | America First. Always. | == | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Meeting the Moment
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501149570%2501February%2bNewsletter%2b02-21-21%250115412.24273086.5079520.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501149570%2501February%2bNewsletter%2b02-21-21%250115412.24273086.5079520.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **February 21, 2021** |
---|---|---|---
| | | During Black History Month we honor the legacy and sacrifice of those, famous and not, who through their words, actions, and accomplishments advanced the long struggle for racial justice and equity. That struggle must be ours as we work together to achieve real change and ensure our country finally lives up to the full promise of liberty and justice for all. Big challenges remain, but we have a reason to be hopeful as we enter a new chapter in our nation's history. Let's move forward with urgency to complete the work ahead. I'll be fighting this month and every month to tackle these injustices, and I hope you'll join me.
---
### Defending our Democratic Institutions
The Senate trial made clear - Donald Trump committed high crimes and misdemeanors against our nation in his incitement of the insurrection on our Capitol on January 6th to overturn the election results. He violated his duty and oath of office to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution - and in fact, his actions flew directly in the face of this most sacred responsibility. The overwhelming documentation provided by the House impeachment managers underscored this truth. That is why I [voted to convict](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-vote-to-convict-trump%26redir_log%3d865620995694693&redir_log=457247400611938) Donald Trump. I remain deeply troubled by the decision of so many Republican Senators to vote to acquit. If Trump's conduct was not a crime against the Constitution, what is? Make no mistake - they have inflicted lasting harm on our nation in their failure to hold Donald Trump accountable; they have failed the test of history, and that is likely to haunt us in the years ahead. But I am encouraged that this vote did not fall strictly along party lines. In fact, it was the largest bipartisan impeachment vote to convict a president in American history. And I feel certain that the American people know the truth of Donald Trump's guilt. This trial brought to light his crimes against our Constitution, and these crimes will not be erased. Together, we must work to undo the damage of the Trump era and move forward as a country. The Senate trial also highlighted the sacrifices and courage of many Capitol Hill Police Officers, including the heroic actions of Officer Eugene Goodman of Maryland. By redirecting violent rioters away from the Senate chamber on January 6th, Officer Goodman defended our democracy and saved the lives of Senators and staff. He is wholly deserving of the highest civilian honor bestowed by Congress, and I'm glad the Senate acted quickly to pass the legislation I introduced to recognize his quick thinking and bravery with a [Congressional Gold Medal](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fsenate-unanimously-passes-legislation-awarding-congressional-gold-medal-to-uscp-officer-eugene-goodman%26redir_log%3d999315068231094&redir_log=963951233622350).
### Passing an Emergency Plan that Meets the Moment
Our most urgent priority must be to provide more relief to Americans struggling against the weight of the health and economic impacts of COVID-19. Since last March, I've worked to secure five major bipartisan relief bills in Congress, including the CARES Act and the $900 billion measure that was signed into law in December. These packages have helped Marylanders weather the storm of COVID-19 by bolstering our public health infrastructure and extending a lifeline to working families and small businesses harmed by the economic fallout. And while I was glad that we've been able to take these steps to mitigate some impacts of the pandemic, now is not the time to pat ourselves on the back, say we're done, and throw in the towel. These are unprecedented times, and [we need to go big before it's too late](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-the-senate-budget-resolution-passage%26redir_log%3d164670552134800&redir_log=065402377142045). We must ramp up vaccine production and distribution, expand testing and access to N95 masks, get help to those hardest hit, get our children safely back in school, and put our economy on the road to recovery. I was proud to [speak](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1357372496958357504%26redir_log%3d801947699195374&redir_log=910345544451608) on the Senate floor in favor of the budget resolution that will allow us to pass President Biden's American Rescue Plan in the Senate with a simple majority and am now working urgently with colleagues to get this ambitious package across the finish line. The experts and the American people agree with me on this one. Secretary of the Treasury Janet Yellen has said: "The smartest thing we can do is act big." Even President Trump's former top economist, Kevin Hassett, has supported that assessment. And the American people are on board with President Biden's American Rescue Plan, which would accelerate the deployment of vaccines and testing; help get our students back into school as quickly and safely as possible; extend enhanced unemployment benefits beyond mid-March; double the amount of rental assistance available to those at risk of eviction; extend badly needed support to local governments on the front lines; provide another round of individual payments based on income eligibility; and, very importantly, expand the child tax credit in a way that would cut child poverty by more than 40% this year. All of these measures are necessary to beat the virus and prevent a double-dip economic recession. As we fight for relief on the federal front, I remain deeply troubled by the lack of statewide coordination and communication in Maryland's vaccine rollout. At the time of this writing, Maryland is ranked 49th among all 50 states for percent of total vaccines administered and 41st among all 50 states for vaccines administered per 100,000 people, according to CDC data. And while I'm glad more vaccines are coming in, our state needs a more transparent and efficient process to get vaccines to Marylanders in a more equitable way. I was glad to be joined by my colleagues in the Maryland congressional delegation earlier this month in a [letter](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16037QQQ24132028QQQ5079638QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252foutreach.senate.gov%252fiqextranet%252fiqClickTrk.aspx%253f%2526cid%253dSenVanHollen%2526crop%253d15969QQQ24132007QQQ5079617QQQ7967967%2526report_id%253d%2526redirect%253dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252foutreach.senate.gov%25252fiqextranet%25252fiqClickTrk.aspx%25253f%252526cid%25253dSenVanHollen%252526crop%25253d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%252526report_id%25253d%252526redirect%25253dhttps%2525253a%2525252f%2525252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2525252fnews%2525252fpress-releases%2525252fvan-hollen-brown-lead-maryland-delegation-calling-for-a-course-correction-to-marylands-vaccine-distribution-approach%252526redir_log%25253d603072154061194%2526redir_log%253d356022322862447%26redir_log%3d877484541663719&redir_log=869004352575150) to Governor Hogan, which called for a course correction in Maryland's vaccine distribution approach. These calls have since been echoed by [Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16037QQQ24132028QQQ5079638QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252foutreach.senate.gov%252fiqextranet%252fiqClickTrk.aspx%253f%2526cid%253dSenVanHollen%2526crop%253d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%2526report_id%253d%2526redirect%253dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252fmayor.baltimorecity.gov%25252fnews%25252fpress-releases%25252f2021-02-02-mayor-calls-governor-improved-coordination-vaccine-distribution%2526redir_log%253d72674140973882%26redir_log%3d129892196322119&redir_log=049290211423383) and our [county leaders](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16037QQQ24132028QQQ5079638QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252foutreach.senate.gov%252fiqextranet%252fiqClickTrk.aspx%253f%2526cid%253dSenVanHollen%2526crop%253d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%2526report_id%253d%2526redirect%253dhttps%25253a%25252f%25252fconduitstreet.mdcounties.org%25252fwp-content%25252fuploads%25252f02-08-2021-County-Letter-to-Gov-Hogan-RE-Vaccine-Distribution-Suggestions.pdf%2526redir_log%253d933312597497910%26redir_log%3d988493693072150&redir_log=848137725093415). I will continue to push for accountability and action at the state level so we can get more shots into the arms of Marylanders as soon as possible. I'll also keep pushing for the federal relief measures necessary to bolster vaccine distribution in our communities, secure our supply chain, and strengthen vaccine confidence and communication.
### Fixing USPS
I've been hearing from hundreds of constituents about slow postal delivery, and I share their anger and frustration at this unacceptable situation. Medication shipments have gone missing, many small businesses cannot get their products to customers, and many are getting hit with late fees for bill payments that didn't arrive on time because of mail delivery delays. The situation is doubly frustrating because the Congress allocated an additional $10 billion to the Postal Service to help meet its needs during the pandemic, and that money must be put to use restoring the service that the American people have come to expect from the dedicated men and women of the Postal Service. That's why I led a [letter](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-leads-maryland-delegation-members-in-pressing-dejoy-on-usps-delays%26redir_log%3d080509562261916&redir_log=399570319672164) with the Maryland congressional delegation demanding action from Postmaster General Louis DeJoy. In the letter, we urged DeJoy to halt any further downsizing measures and return to the 2012 service standards, which would reinstate overnight delivery and shorten delivery time. The Postal Service leadership needs to take responsibility for the harm done by their cutbacks, fix the issues that have plagued deliveries, and replace Louis DeJoy. Trump may have left office, but his Postmaster General is still wreaking havoc on mail delivery that Marylanders and all Americans rely on. It's time for fresh leadership at USPS, and I will continue to push for reliable service, more accountability, and faster delivery times moving forward. Our push to improve postal delivery is the result of what I have been hearing from the hundreds of constituents who reached out to my office voicing their concern. It's just one example of how our state is strongest when we work together. [I want to hear from you](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15924QQQ24131940QQQ5079550QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fcontact%26redir_log%3d475918421268285&redir_log=728695172131491) and hope you will continue to stay engaged. Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15412.24273086.5079520.7517223)

[**Help protect voting rights | Urge Congress to pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25331071/273521174/-1596900047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMmQ1MDM3LWE2NzQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6HKmLYJSM14h-veM9UTWEA4bIAxUmrhwHxn6yyIPruk=&emci=af09ae88-a574-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=612d5037-a674-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)

---
Voter suppression tactics are nothing new -- something the late Congressman John Lewis knew all too well.
That's why 56 years ago -- during the height of the Civil Rights movement -- Congress passed the _Voting Rights Act_ , which aimed to protect the votes of people of color by making discriminatory voting practices illegal.
Despite this historic legislation, voter suppression tactics are still alive and well. Between voter roll purging, unnecessarily strict voter ID laws, and intentionally limited polling places, Republican-led legislatures are doing everything in their power to make it harder for traditionally Democratic voters to participate in our democracy.
**_What can we do?_ We can start by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which will help restore voting rights. **
[**Will you sign on to demand our nation's leaders protect voters' rights by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25331073/273521176/-1596900047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMmQ1MDM3LWE2NzQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6HKmLYJSM14h-veM9UTWEA4bIAxUmrhwHxn6yyIPruk=&emci=af09ae88-a574-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=612d5037-a674-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)
Thank you so much,
– _Every. Single. Vote._

name: Team Stanton
subject: Our essential workers deserve an essential wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
It's been over a decade since the Federal minimum wage was raised. During that time, the cost of medical care, housing, college tuition, and goods and services have increased. Meanwhile the pay for working adults trying to make a living has not changed. Americans are working longer hours to make ends meet and receive less in return for their hard earned money. Sadly, many essential workers that have been our country's lifeline during this awful pandemic are living on wages that do not reflect their value to our communities and economy. Americans agree they deserve a raise - it's long overdue to raise the minimum wage.

[Will you join us and sign on to the petition calling on Congress to raise the Federal minimum wage?](https://act.myngp.com/el/95eCnwRg15_u4Gnclw1WeG3mx_txNx2QmTmbKfGRvbE=/XtMbMyWtn187k8g2uj0q5KHUPPzPtwYBPrXw7wml2ns=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/95eCnwRg15_u4Gnclw1WeG3mx_txNx2QmTmbKfGRvbE=/XtMbMyWtn187k8g2uj0q5KHUPPzPtwYBPrXw7wml2ns=)

Thank you for your support!

In solidarity,
\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Tim Scott
subject: Don’t let the Democrats and media cancel me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
They don't want you to hear my family's story of going from cotton to Congress in one lifetime. They don't want you to know about how I grew up in a single parent household and worked my way to where I am today. They don't want you to hear about my story because it goes against everything the Democrats say is wrong with America.
Friend,

Since being elected, the Democrats and their media allies have done everything they can to try to erase my American story. **You see, Friend, the far Left feels threatened by me.**

They don't want you to hear my family's story of going from cotton to Congress in one lifetime. They don't want you to know about how I grew up in a single parent household and worked my way to where I am today.

**They don 't want you to hear about my story because it goes against everything the Democrats say is wrong with America. [Friend, will you chip in to help me keep telling my American story?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/telling-my-story/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210221_H-T.101410_tim-scott_t1048521-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=H-T.101410&utm_content=20210221_dont-let-the-democrats-and-media-cancel-me/)**

I have been called every ugly term you can think of because I am a proud Black conservative. Democrats can't stand that someone with my story would think the way I do, so **they do everything they can to cancel me.**

But Friend, my story isn't over. Our mission to spread conservative values is only just beginning. I need your help to keep going. [**Will you please chip in $10, $50, $100, or anything you can to help?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/telling-my-story/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210221_H-T.101410_tim-scott_t1048521-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=H-T.101410&utm_content=20210221_dont-let-the-democrats-and-media-cancel-me/)

Thank you,

Tim Scott
[CHIP IN NOW](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/telling-my-story/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210221_H-T.101410_tim-scott_t1048521-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=H-T.101410&utm_content=20210221_dont-let-the-democrats-and-media-cancel-me/)

body:
%%First Name%%, believe it or not, the Democrats are already making moves to flip this seat from red to blue.zwnj;
****

. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hei5XC5GfPeBPA7ZA-fxqq3njzrRbBKjXkBNt-PTzlo0gsnowDlboya6-KIN3NxGCzBccC0ip4dDJlqiTe2Jt6pBZa76JNY1imQEnLhUsOpBPyCzNulCmkB8N1e7QiV2uQjglWHrKk9NGZRGl3lzXKJPO7_k3Ohe8WajvGOK_EhLfG33-CDFY0aZbp1zTBqkn4GJ_H02vyR9eaNV78g2oMiVOXE2pqL5eA3OsgAp3HJJOJ-Qp3YQMjp7Yu__CbSlTNfZ4-qlhvdty6yI2Ssh2cSgZ9HkfAW19nTeBwbvSl7MBG7ZyiG-SL4Qqi98DTQTUdjZ8ZU3WFl8_1fN5cKxz1W9RrwCJk69KlvzPat756sy0C3I5CGDoonwKo7aq27JVDpWjkBnouob1paM8dbOqWOV_iwgc-yVQHTRn4Pc-_jZ_gfMv7genSMY8H5RoCtjYdCjxhJXumfWRUkLmR1v7xvG3PpdhAPJ&c=gM7lwv_994wwhkeeZ8x4e6bnym2t7fwI927MB-aGs9Dnhl7ano0H4w==&ch=-VZzEWxAYUDBoYkQLbozBIawUr4tqH2taE9xZfg0cDIbMlDUEX88iQ==)
Friend,

Michelle Steel has been fighting for taxpayers her entire life.

When she first came to America with her single mother, she discovered a system that was failing the very people it was supposed to help. She saw how the system unfairly taxed her mom's small business and how hard her mother fought to keep it going.

From there, Michelle has returned more than $400 million to California taxpayers and fought against policies that raise taxes and hurt small businesses. Michelle Steel continues to fight for lower taxes and common-sense solutions that work to make California a more affordable place to live and so that everyone who wants to pursue their goals can have the same American Dream that she had.

clean_body: %%First Name%%, believe it or not, the Democrats are already making moves to flip this seat from red to blue.zwnj; ** . == Friend, Michelle Steel has been fighting for taxpayers her entire life. When she first came to America with her single mother, she discovered a system that was failing the very people it was supposed to help. She saw how the system unfairly taxed her mom's small business and how hard her mother fought to keep it going. From there, Michelle has returned more than $400 million to California taxpayers and fought against policies that raise taxes and hurt small businesses.
